title: Notification to a Checklist Item for Monday
excerpt: I am using the Checklist for Monday by Monday. My question, how do I setup an automation/workflow/integration that will notify a checklist item assignee that they have been assigned a checklist item? It seems to be a pre…

posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using the Checklist for Monday by Monday. My question, how do I setup an automation/workflow/integration that will notify a checklist item assignee that they have been assigned a checklist item? It seems to be a pretty basic function, but I cannot find any info on how to do this. Any help would be appreciated.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @david.lowe
his is a known limitation.

Checklist item assignees inside Checklist for Monday aren’t treated like a native People column, so standard monday.com automations can’t trigger a notification when someone is assigned a checklist item.

Best options:

  1. Assign the person in a People column on the item and use a normal “notify when assigned” automation

  2. Check the Checklist app widget settings to see if it has its own built in notifications

  3. If you need notifications reliably, consider using subitems instead of checklist items since subitems support native assignees and automations

    If you’d like hands-on help or want us to walk through this live, you can book a 1:1 paid 60-minute strategy session with our team here:
    Calendly

posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Tabvi, Yeah, seems a bit odd that this kind of thing is not native. Thanks for the help.
